allow: PowerShell(Get-ChildItem -Path "f:\\relatorio_claude" -Recurse -File | Where-Object { $_.FullName -notmatch 'node_modules' } | Sort-Object FullName | Select-Object -ExpandProperty FullName)

Bash(find C:/Users/leand -name "*.ts" -path "*apenado*" 2>/dev/null | head -5; find C:/Users/leand -name "*.ts" -path "*arcface*" 2>/dev/null | head -5; find C:/Users/leand -type d -name "*arcface*" 2>/dev/null | head -5)
Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; e=json.load\(sys.stdin\)[0]['Config']['Env']; [print\(x\) for x in e if 'DATABASE' in x.upper\(\) or 'POSTGRES' in x.upper\(\) or 'DB_' in x.upper\(\)]")
Bash(node -e "const p = require\('./package.json'\); console.log\('framer-motion:', p.dependencies['framer-motion'] || 'NOT FOUND'\)")
PowerShell(cd f:\\relatorio_claude; npx tsc --noEmit 2>&1 | Where-Object { $_ -notmatch "\\.next" } | Select-Object -First 40)
PowerShell(cd f:\\relatorio_claude; $output = npx tsc --noEmit 2>&1 | Out-String; $lines = $output -split "`n" | Where-Object { $_ -notmatch "\\.next" }; $lines -join "`n")
PowerShell(cd f:\\relatorio_claude; $result = npx tsc --noEmit 2>&1; Write-Host \($result | Where-Object { $_ -notmatch "\\.next" } | Out-String\))
PowerShell(cd f:\\relatorio_claude; $r = npx tsc --noEmit 2>&1; $r | Select-String -NotMatch "\\.next" | ForEach-Object { $_.Line } | Select-Object -First 40)
PowerShell(cd f:\\relatorio_claude; npx tsc --noEmit 2>&1 > C:\\Temp\\tsc_out.txt; Get-Content C:\\Temp\\tsc_out.txt | Where-Object { $_ -notmatch "\\.next" })
PowerShell(cd f:\\relatorio_claude; npx tsc --noEmit 2>&1 > "$env:TEMP\\tsc_out.txt"; Get-Content "$env:TEMP\\tsc_out.txt" | Where-Object { $_ -notmatch "\\.next" })
PowerShell(cd f:\\relatorio_claude; npx tsc --noEmit 2>&1 | Out-File -FilePath "$env:TEMP\\tsc_out.txt" -Encoding utf8; Get-Content "$env:TEMP\\tsc_out.txt" | Where-Object { $_ -notmatch "\\.next" })

PowerShell(cd f:\\relatorio_claude; npx tsc --noEmit 2>&1 | Out-File "$env:TEMP\\tsc_out.txt" -Encoding utf8; if \(Test-Path "$env:TEMP\\tsc_out.txt"\) { Get-Content "$env:TEMP\\tsc_out.txt" | Where-Object { $_ -notmatch "\\.next" } } else { Write-Host "file not found" })
